evidence: "Funny family movie but some of the things they did to the little girl actually happen."
"Awesome show with a little bit of everything in it."
"Enjoyed the show from beginning to end, would recommend."
"Great show if you like sci/fi. Great actors with a little bit of everything."
"Very funny and a real pleasure to watch. Good clean fun!"
"Awesome family movie, lots of lessons taught in this one. I give this one an A"
"Not particularly pleased with the show, not what I thought it would be."
"Enjoyed the beginning of the movie but the longer it played the more lost I became, not worth the time it took to watch."
"It's Kiefer Sutherland what's not to like. Great show"
"Awesome series, Steven King at his best!!!"
"Great comedy show with a little kick, love it."
"Awesome show that actually teaches children something."
"This series is mind blowing, great if you like the supernatural this one's for you."

summary: The user enjoys light-hearted comedies and family-friendly content, often with elements of magic or fantasy. They appreciate fast-paced storytelling and visual humor, while showing a moderate emotional connection to the shows they watch.
